heroHeadline: Af-Pak Non-Escalation Holds as Pakistan Focuses on Iran Mediation
heroSubtitle: The Urumqi non-escalation framework (Apr 9) has held for 9+ consecutive days — the longest lull since Op Ghazab-il-Haq began Feb 26. Pakistan PM Sharif and Army Chief Munir return Apr 18 from parallel Gulf/Tehran diplomatic missions aimed at arranging US-Iran Round 2 before April 22 ceasefire expiry. Second Af-Pak Urumqi round due end of April.
footerNote: Data sourced from UNAMA, SIGAR, ACLED, Brown University Costs of War Project, US DoD, Reuters, BBC, Tolo News, Dawn, Al Jazeera, HRW, OHCHR
